_meta.description: JSON request bodies for TLDCRM read-only egress queries. Sent as GET requests with a JSON body (Content-Type: application/json). PULL ONLY — nothing is written back.
_meta.date_rule: TLD's canonical date filter: the client sends BOTH date + date_end AND date_sold + date_sold_end, formatted 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS' with full-day bounds (00:00:00 .. 23:59:59). This holds for the policies endpoint and the CPA report. EXCEPTION: the raw leads endpoint ignores date/date_sold and must be filtered on date_created — those queries set 'date_field': 'date_created' to override (verified by probe_migrate_check.py). Queries flagged 'date_bounded': true get date handling in tldcrm_client._payload().
_meta.notes: columns is a JSON array; sort direction is 'sort' (ASC|DESC). Matches the working payload shape from TLD.
